name: Draconic Cry
description: As a bonus action, let out a cry. Until your next turn, you and allies have advantage on attack rolls against enemies within 10ft who heard you. Uses = Proficiency Bonus/Long Rest.

name: Actor
description: Skilled at mimicry and dramatics. +1 Charisma, advantage on Deception/Performance when passing as someone else, and can mimic speech.

name: Alert
description: Always on the lookout for danger. +5 to initiative, can't be surprised while conscious, and other creatures don't get advantage on attack rolls against you as a result of being unseen.

name: Athlete
description: Undergone physical training. +1 Strength or Dexterity, standing up uses only 5ft of movement, and climbing doesn't cost extra movement.

name: Crusher
description: Practiced in crushing your foes. +1 Strength or Constitution, once per turn move a creature 5ft when hitting with bludgeoning damage, and critical hits grant advantage to all attacks until start of next turn.

name: Fey Touched
description: Exposed to the Feywild's magic. +1 Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. Learn Misty Step and one 1st-level Divination or Enchantment spell.

name: Great Weapon Master
description: You've learned to put the weight of a weapon to your advantage. Extra attack on crit/kill, and -5 to hit for +10 damage.

name: Lucky
description: You have inexplicable luck that seems to come at just the right moment. 3 Luck Points to spend on rerolls for attacks, checks, or saves.

name: Magic Initiate
description: You have learned some magic. Learn 2 cantrips and one 1st-level spell from a specific class list.

name: Mobile
description: You are exceptionally speedy and agile. +10 speed, dash ignores difficult terrain, and no opportunity attacks if you make a melee attack.

name: Observant
description: Quick to notice details of your environment. +1 Intelligence or Wisdom, can read lips, and +5 to passive Perception/Investigation.

name: Piercer
description: You have a practiced precision with piercing weapons. +1 Strength or Dexterity, reroll one piercing damage die per turn, and critical hits add one extra damage die.

name: Polearm Master
description: You can keep your enemies at bay with reach weapons. Bonus action butt-end attack, and opportunity attack when creatures enter your reach.

name: Resilient
description: Choose one ability score. +1 to that score and gain proficiency in saving throws using that score.

name: Sentinel
description: You have mastered techniques to take advantage of every drop in any enemy's guard. Zero speed on opportunity hits, ignore Disengage, and reaction attack when allies are hit.

name: Shadow Touched
description: Exposed to the Shadowfell's magic. +1 Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. Learn Invisibility and one 1st-level Illusion or Necromancy spell.

name: Sharpshooter
description: Mastered ranged weapons. Ignore partial cover, no disadvantage at long range, and -5 to hit for +10 damage.

name: Slasher
description: You've learned where to cut to have the greatest results. +1 Strength or Dexterity, once per turn reduce creature speed by 10ft on slashing hit, and critical hits impose disadvantage on creature's attacks.

name: Tough
description: Your hit point maximum increases by an amount equal to twice your level when you gain this feat. Whenever you gain a level thereafter, your hit point maximum increases by an additional 2 hit points.

name: War Caster
description: Practiced in casting spells in the thick of combat. Advantage on Concentration saves, can perform S components with weapons/shield, and spells as opportunity attacks.
